name: VELLUM Tracker
author: VELLUM Preset
description: Floating illuminated tracker + long-term Chronicle + auto-summary memory for the VELLUM Living Narrative Engine. Parses <ledger>/[BTS], maintains a persistent Chronicle (arcs, threads, events, shifts), autonomously summarizes older turns into keyworded chapter-memories via background generation, and recalls scene-relevant entries + memories through the interceptor — no lorebook needed. Renders a floating window and a paginated Chronicle tab.
